content.title: Tonight's Lucky Aura Preview
content.message: A small confident choice can make the next moment feel easier.
content.outfit: Wear one clean line with a soft highlight near the face.
content.beauty: Keep the glow fresh and the finish light.
content.social: Open with a warm compliment and one clear question.
content.ritual: Take three slow breaths before stepping out.
content.avoid: Avoid over-planning the first ten minutes.
content.caption: Today I am carrying rose lantern aura.

content.title: Full Lucky Aura Card
content.message: Warm presence can turn a small exchange into a memorable one.
content.outfit: Use one playful accent and keep the rest effortless.
content.beauty: Let one feature catch light while the rest stays natural.
content.social: Join the first friendly circle and ask what made their week brighter.
content.ritual: Smile at yourself once before you enter the room.
content.avoid: Avoid performing for people who are not meeting your energy.
content.caption: Today I am carrying golden comet aura.
